findings.justification: ajax_paginate() is reachable as a nopriv AJAX handler and calls only UM()->check_ajax_nonce() (a frontend nonce that unauthenticated visitors can obtain), with no current_user_can() capability check, allowing any visitor to fire arbitrary um_ajax_load_posts__{$hook} actions.
The $args array is taken directly from $_REQUEST['args'] without any sanitization or type validation, then passed verbatim to do_action(), so action handlers receive fully attacker-controlled data.

The output buffered from do_action() is echoed via die($output) with no escaping or wp_kses filtering (a TODO comment acknowledges this), enabling XSS if any hooked action reflects attacker-supplied data.
